data.body: CHECKPOINT 5 (2026-07-13) ARCHITECTURAL PIVOT — retire auto-lander. Plan documented in epic d4de-7d65-2a96-48be + 6 children (c1da ADR0047, d0e5 delete-code, bcf0 decommission-infra, 03c6 Gerrit-cutover-FFO->Rebase-If-Necessary DO-LAST, 5e7a docs-sweep, f542 safety-net). Decision: relax pre-merge re-CI on non-conflicted rebases; main FFO->Rebase-If-Necessary (Gerrit integrates server-side); drop bot; agents Submit directly; post-merge main CI + manual revert safety net. IN FLIGHT: ADR0047=Gerrit #661, flakefix 85c3=#662 (need CI+Submit). dc33/15a1/0d3e obsoleted (close when d0e5 lands). f1fa superseded. Bot PAUSED (being deleted). Plan-review gate TIMED OUT (>10min, left a stale tickets index.lock now cleared) on d4de — on resume review-plan-then-claim (or force) per ticket. Worktree ~/rebar-dc33 branch migrate-rebase-if-necessary (venv agents). Land via plain Gerrit Submit; admin JoeOakhartNava; AWS profile frontier; instance i-00880b2c7f13527c5. Full detail in ticket d4de.
